docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOGAN, JUDITH A. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F. TRUITT, RONALD J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGAN, JUDITH A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFT TRUIT, DONALD. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F.
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F. HEARING SET FOR MAY-29-1996 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
PLTF NOTICE OF HRGING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPT. NOTICE & NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED.
CIVIL SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO, MARIANNE F. TRUIT, FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FOR 5-29-96 FROM S F SHERIFF'S.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAY-29-1996, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMNT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,239.60 AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, MARIANNE F.
